headline: Why Starbucks fled the city for the exurbs
summary: Starbucks isn’t just chasing population growth. It’s becoming an exurban company because, unlike in denser cities, there’s room for drive-throughs.

raw.headline: Why Starbucks fled the city for the exurbs
raw.summary: Starbucks isn’t just chasing population growth. It’s becoming an exurban company because, unlike in denser cities, there’s room for drive-throughs.

headline: A look at how Chipotle’s loyalty relaunch could affect customer behavior
summary: Value is a major component of the loyalty revamp, and the approach could drive in-restaurant traffic and help the company win over less frequent customers.
